response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience, including embedded systems and C/C++ (from National Instruments and Altom Consulting), but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), and embedded networking hardware. Japanese language proficiency is not mentioned, which is a critical requirement. The resume highlights extensive work in web, mobile, and desktop applications rather than embedded networking or security features.
strengths: Extensive experience with C/C++ programming, including embedded systems (National Instruments, robotic arms at Altom Consulting)
Demonstrated ability to work across full stack (web, mobile, embedded) with strong debugging and optimization skills
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical leadership (GISCollective, workshops, talks)
concerns: No evidence of Linux kernel modification experience or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems)
No mention of Japanese language proficiency, which is a mandatory requirement for the role
Lacks exposure to embedded networking hardware, switch chips, or network security protocols (REST API, NETCONF, SNMP, etc.)
